bonuses.stat: On dealing damage, summon a Cindermoth that chases your target without mercy for 8 seconds. If your target dies before the moth reaches them, it seeks a new target within 8 meters. The first enemy that nears the Cindermoth causes it to stop and burst after 1 second, dealing 1283 Flame damage and Burning enemies within 8 meters. This can occur once every 8 seconds and scales off your Weapon or Spell Damage.
